title: tragoselinum magnum
intro: Tragoselinum magnum, also known as giant wild angelica, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Tragoselinum magnum include its ability to help with digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for fever reduction and wound healing. Herbal preparations of Tragoselinum magnum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
